sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n106904" key="u(pa/nesis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπάν-εσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n106904.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">remission</tr_> of fevers, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:46:25:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">46.25.7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
